chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.05 of 2023 Faheem Hussain Zaidi Versus Saeed & another Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. Dated: 14.11.2023 None present. -.-.- It has been coming up for non-prosecution ever since this appeal was scrutinized by the office and fixed before the Court for consideration. It was fixed for non-prosecution on 02.02.2023 when no one from appellant side was in attendance; followed by order of 10.03.2023 when one week time was granted for compliance and then again when it was fixed on 30.05.2023 seven days’ time was granted. Today position is same. There is no intimation, either for appellant or his counsel. Instant First Appeal as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
